hero.title: C-Voices
hero.subtitle: Socialist Core Values Intelligent Evaluation System

home.title: C-Voices: LLM Core Value Evaluation System
home.subtitle: C-Voices: LLM Value Evaluation System
home.description1: C-Voices is a value evaluation and visual analysis platform for large language models, built upon the 12 dimensions of Chinese Socialist Core Values (Prosperity, Democracy, Civility, Harmony, Freedom, Equality, Justice, Rule of Law, Patriotism, Dedication, Integrity, and Friendship) to establish a unified evaluation framework for systematic and quantitative analysis of model value orientations across various scenarios.
home.description2: The platform empowers researchers and developers to comprehensively understand model value expression characteristics at national, social, and individual levels through two evaluation modes: open-ended Q&A and value-based choice questions, enabling risk identification and facilitating model alignment and optimization.
home.openQuestionMode: Open-ended Mode: Randomly selects evaluation questions and performs 12-dimension scoring based on model-generated responses.
home.choiceQuestionMode: Choice-based Mode: Presents A/B options (Support/Oppose) for value dilemmas and calculates model support rates across each dimension.
home.conclusion: Through these two evaluation modes, C-Voices enables you to quickly gain insights into different models' value orientations and potential risks at national, social, and individual levels.
home.featureModulesSubtitle: Choose your desired feature module to begin your intelligent evaluation journey
home.modelEvaluationDescription: Unified value dimension evaluation and comparative analysis of different large language models, helping users understand model value characteristics and providing a foundation for model selection, alignment optimization, and safety assessment.

videoEvaluation.title: Video Value 12-Dimension Scoring
videoEvaluation.subtitle: Multimodal video analysis combining visual content and audio dialogue for value assessment
videoEvaluation.description1: This feature utilizes multimodal AI technology to conduct in-depth analysis of video content. The system automatically extracts key frames for visual analysis while transcribing audio dialogue, comprehensively evaluating the value orientation of video content.
videoEvaluation.description2: Suitable for value analysis of various video content types including educational videos, promotional materials, news reports, and documentaries, helping content creators and regulatory agencies quickly assess the value orientation of videos.

textScoring.title: Text Value 12-Dimension Scoring
textScoring.subtitle: Analyze value orientation of any input text and output 12-dimension scoring results
textScoring.description1: This feature performs value analysis on individual text segments, utilizing a unified trained scoring model to quantitatively evaluate text content across 12 dimensions: Prosperity, Democracy, Civility, Harmony, Freedom, Equality, Justice, Rule of Law, Patriotism, Dedication, Integrity, and Friendship.
textScoring.description2: Ideal for rapid value orientation detection and risk analysis of model-generated content, human-written text, or dialogue fragments.
textScoring.description3: Supports pasting model outputs, dialogue content, or any text fragments, automatically generating radar charts and dimension scores.

modelEvaluation.title: Model Value Evaluation and Comparative Analysis
modelEvaluation.subtitle: Unified value dimension evaluation and comparative analysis of different large language models
modelEvaluation.description1: This page facilitates systematic value evaluation of multiple large language models. The platform generates comparable evaluation results based on unified evaluation question sets and scoring standards, conducting comprehensive 12-dimension analysis of model outputs.
modelEvaluation.description2: Through comparative analysis of performance differences across various value dimensions, users gain insights into model value characteristics, providing a foundation for model selection, alignment optimization, and safety assessment.

evaluate.title: Model Value Evaluation and Comparative Analysis
evaluate.subtitle: Unified value dimension evaluation and comparative analysis of different large language models
evaluate.description1: This page facilitates systematic value evaluation of multiple large language models. The platform generates comparable evaluation results based on unified evaluation question sets and scoring standards, conducting comprehensive 12-dimension analysis of model outputs.
evaluate.description2: Through comparative analysis of performance differences across various value dimensions, users gain insights into model value characteristics, providing a foundation for model selection, alignment optimization, and safety assessment.
